about.title: Driving Reliable Solutions for Sustainable Growth.
about.paragraph: AIM Group provides integrated contracting and project support services for the infrastructure and resource sectors. With a strong commitment to operational excellence, safety standards, and good governance practices, AIM Group ensures reliable and efficient project delivery. The company plays an active role in supporting contractor operations at Leighton Pomalaa, contributing to consistent performance and sustainable development.
about.breadcrumb_description: A quick look at who we are—our vision, mission, and commitment to grow together.
about.vision_description: To become a leading contractor and industrial service provider in Sulawesi, grounded in professionalism, integrity, and the empowerment of local resources, while actively contributing to sustainable development in Indonesia.
mission_list: Provide high-quality construction and electrical services that are delivered on time and adhere to strict occupational health and safety (OHS) standards.
Deliver efficient, reliable heavy equipment rental solutions tailored to project requirements.
Develop competent and competitive local workforce through continuous training, certification, and mentoring programs.
Establish strategic partnerships with national and local companies to create added value and sustainable business opportunities.
Uphold integrity, social responsibility, and environmental stewardship in all operational activities.
Drive regional economic growth in Sulawesi through projects focused on community development and local infrastructure.

contact.title: Contact Page
contact.description: Contact us for more information about our services and projects. We are ready to help your infrastructure and resource needs.
contact.form_subtitle: Our support team will get back to you ASAP via email.
contact.newsletter_subtitle: Enter your name and email to get the latest information updates from us
contact.newsletter_no_spam: No spam guaranteed, so please don't hesitate to subscribe.

slide1.title: Empowering a Sustainable Future
slide1.description: Committed to building solutions that support long-term environmental and social progress.

slide2.title: Innovating for Tomorrow

business.breadcrumb_description: At PT AIM, we are committed to delivering innovative and sustainable business solutions across various sectors.
business.section_description: We specialize in providing end-to-end solutions that empower foundations and businesses to reach their maximum potential.
business.domain1_description: Building the backbone of modern society with reliable and sustainable infrastructure projects.
business.domain2_description: Leveraging cutting-edge AI and data analytics to solve complex operational challenges.
business.domain3_description: Providing expert strategic advice to help businesses navigate the ever-changing market landscape.

career.breadcrumb_description: Join a team that values innovation, integrity, and sustainable growth. Be a part of the AIM Group.
career.section_description: We empower our employees to grow and innovate, providing a supportive environment where ideas can flourish.
career.benefit1_description: Work on cutting-edge projects that push the boundaries of what is possible.
career.benefit2_description: We invest in our people through continuous learning and development programs.
career.benefit3_description: Join a diverse team that values unique perspectives and collaborative spirit.
career.email_instruction: or send your application via email to: recruitment@aimgroup.id

cg.breadcrumb_description: At PT AIM, we prioritize integrity, accountability, and transparency in all our business dealings and leadership actions.
cg.section_description: We ensure sustainable growth and value for all stakeholders through robust corporate governance practices.
cg.principle1_description: We take full responsibility for our actions and decisions, ensuring alignment with stakeholder interests.
cg.principle2_description: Open communication with our stakeholders, providing clear and accurate information about our performance.
cg.principle3_description: Upholding the highest ethical standards in every transaction and interaction.
cg.principle4_description: Governance focused on long-term value creation and social responsibility.
cg.compliance_description: We are committed to maintaining the highest standards of regulatory compliance and professional ethics in all our operations. Our leadership team ensures that every project aligns with national regulations and industry best practices.

footer.description: Providing integrated contracting and project support services for the infrastructure and resource sectors.

home_about.title: About AIM Group
home_about.description: AIM Group is a Pomalaa-based holding that oversees two major entities: PT. AIM - Anoa Indonesia Mining and PT. AIM - Anoa Indonesia Mekongga, providing integrated solutions in mining, construction, and manpower.
home_about.subtext: Inspired by the Anoa—symbolizing Sulawesi's strength and resilience—we provide professional end-to-end solutions while prioritizing safety, sustainability, and local empowerment.

services.title: Our Business Domain
services.description: Rooted in the cultural land of Mekongga in Kolaka Regency, Southeast Sulawesi, AIM Group delivers integrated services to support the comprehensive development of infrastructure and industrial sectors. Backed by professional expertise, capable local resources, and strong strategic partnerships, AIM Group is committed to providing precise, efficient, and value-driven solutions at every stage of the project.
services.contractor_desc: AIM Group delivers end-to-end general contracting services, overseeing construction and infrastructure projects from planning and procurement through execution to final handover, ensuring quality, efficiency, and reliable outcomes.
services.mining_desc: AIM Group delivers integrated mining solutions, covering earthworks, overburden management, and technical site development, prioritizing efficiency, safety, and environmental responsibility.
services.rental_desc: AIM provides various types of quality and ready-to-operate heavy equipment to support construction, mining and infrastructure activities. All our units are maintained regularly to provide maximum performance in the field.
rental_scope: Crane, Forklift and other supporting equipment

org.title: Organization Structure
org.description: Our management structure is designed to ensure smooth operational integration, compliance with industry standards, and efficiency in every service we provide.
